title: Leap Year

content.problemStatement: Write a program to check whether a given year is a leap year or not. If a number is divisible by 400400400 or divisible by 444 but not by 100100100, then the year is considered a leap year. Print **Leap year** if the given year is a leap year; otherwise, print **Not a leap year**.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each of the next T lines contains a single integer year.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print "Leap year" if the year is a leap year, otherwise print "Not a leap year". Each answer on its own line.

sampleTestCases.output:
Leap year
Not a leap year
Leap year
sampleTestCases.explanation: 2024 is divisible by 4 and not by 100 → Leap year. 2023 satisfies neither condition → Not a leap year. 2000 is divisible by 400 → Leap year.
1900 is divisible by 100 but not by 400, so it is not a leap year.

sampleTestCases.output:
Leap year
Not a leap year
sampleTestCases.explanation: 4 is divisible by 4 and not by 100 → Leap year. 100 is divisible by 100 but not by 400 → Not a leap year.

solution.approach: A year is a leap year if it is divisible by 400 or if it is divisible by 4 but not by 100. For each test case we simply apply this rule using modulo operations. The algorithm is O(1) per test case, so the total complexity is O(T). No extra data structures are needed.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) total, O(1) per test case

code.Java: import java.io.*;public class Main{public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception{BufferedReader br=new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in));String line=br.readLine();if(line==null||line.isEmpty())return;int T=Integer.parseInt(line.trim());StringBuilder sb=new StringBuilder();for(int i=0;i<T;i++){String s=br.readLine();while(s!=null&&s.isEmpty()){s=br.readLine();}if(s==null)break;long year=Long.parseLong(s.trim());if(year%400==0||(year%4==0&&year%100!=0)){sb.append("Leap year");}else{sb.append("Not a leap year");}if(i<T-1)sb.append('\n');}System.out.print(sb.toString());}}
